name: WD_CLOCK_SET_TIME
description: Clock setting widget using roller pickers for hour, minute, and AM/PM selection. Three WD_Roller components arranged horizontally. Title shows 'Set Clock' at top. Manages time selection state.
visualForm: Title bar → three horizontal roller pickers (hour | minute | AM/PM) for time setting
descriptionKo: 롤러 피커를 사용해 시/분/AM·PM을 설정하는 시계 설정 위젯입니다. 세 개의 WD_Roller 컴포넌트를 가로로 배치하며, 상단에 시계 설정 타이틀을 표시합니다.
descriptionEn: Clock setting widget using roller pickers for hour, minute, and AM/PM selection. Three WD_Roller components arranged horizontally. Title shows 'Set Clock' at top. Manages time selection state.
